title: SR 13-4: Supervisory Letter SR 13-4 on         Advanced Approaches Risk-Based Capital Rule Examination Guidance on the Board's Public Website  -- March 21, 2013
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 13-4 on         Advanced Approaches Risk-Based Capital Rule Examination Guidance on the Board's Public Website  -- March 21, 2013
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 13-4
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance generally does not apply to community banking organizations, defined as institutions with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AND APPROPRIATE SUPERVISORY AND EXAMINATION STAFF AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
1.  See 12 CFR 208, appendix F (state member banks) and 12 CFR 225, appendix G (bank holding companies). Return to text
bm25_text: SR 13-4 Supervisory Letter SR 13-4 on         Advanced Approaches Risk-Based Capital Rule Examination Guidance on the Board's Public Website  -- March 21, 2013 to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance generally does not apply to community banking organizations, defined as institutions with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AND APPROPRIATE SUPERVISORY AND EXAMINATION STAFF AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT: 1.  See 12 CFR 208, appendix F (state member banks) and 12 CFR 225, appendix G (bank holding companies). Return to text 3.  See http://www.federalreserve.gov/bankinforeg/basel/basel-coordination-committee-bulletins.htm. Return to text 4.  See http://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/contactus/feedback.aspx. Return to text
